title: Pwnedbase
relevance_summary: Phishing and social engineering attacks leading to fund transfers via cloned login pages

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds to a cloned login page URL

red_flags: Funds sent to unknown or suspicious addresses
monitoring_rules: Monitor for URL patterns matching known phishing sites
Detect rapid fund transfers following suspicious activities
summary: Scammers used social engineering tactics including spoofed phone calls and phishing emails to trick Coinbase users into sending funds to a cloned login page. A guard could have prevented this by blocking transactions to known phishing URLs.
